zh.lifeSummary: 當Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum於1491年1月2日之前出生在蘇格蘭維托史爾莫申盧姆時，她的父親John Dunbar of Moray - 1st of Mochrum44歲，母親Janet Stewart31歲。她於1505年與Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany在蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1595年在蘇格蘭艾斯爾巴甘尼。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Mariot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum was born before 2 January 1491, in Mochrum, Wigtownshire, Scotland, her father, John Dunbar of Moray - 1st of Mochrum, was 44 and her mother, Janet Stewart, was 31. She married Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany in 1505, in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died about 1595, in Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum est née avant 2 janvier 1491, à Mochrum, Wigtownshire, Écosse, son père, John Dunbar of Moray - 1st of Mochrum, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Janet Stewart, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany en 1505, à Ayr, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1595, à Bargany, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum vor 2. Januar 1491 in Mochrum, Wigtownshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Dunbar of Moray - 1st of Mochrum 44 und ihre Mutter Janet Stewart 31. Sie hat 1505 in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1595 in Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum è nata il prima del 2 gennaio 1491 nel Mochrum, Wigtownshire, Scotland, sua padre, John Dunbar of Moray - 1st of Mochrum, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Janet Stewart, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany nel 1505, nel Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1595, nel Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Mariot Dunbar of Mochrumが1491年1月2日以前にスコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアモチルムで生まれた時，父John Dunbar of Moray - 1st of Mochrumは44歳，母Janet Stewartは31歳であった。1505年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアエイルでAlexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Barganyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1595年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアバーガニーで死去した。

ko.Mochrum, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 모크럼
ko.lifeSummary: Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum(이)가 1491년 1월 2일 이전 스컷랜드 위그타운실르 모크럼에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Dunbar of Moray - 1st of Mochrum(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Stewart(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1505년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 에이르에서 Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1595년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 바건이에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum nasceu antes 2 de janeiro de 1491, em Mochrum, Wigtownshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Dunbar of Moray - 1st of Mochrum, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Janet Stewart, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany em 1505, em Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1595, em Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.Mochrum, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland: мочрум, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum родилась перед 2 январь 1491 г. в местности мочрум, вигтоуншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Dunbar of Moray - 1st of Mochrum было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Janet Stewart, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany в 1505 г. в местности аир, аиршир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла около 1595 г. в местности баргани, аиршир, Шотландия.
